message:
feat: Add /data preopen backed by CF KV for persistent storage

Second WASI preopen directory at /data (FD 4) with KV persistence:
- Files written to /data/* survive across requests via CF KV
- loadDataFromKV: pre-loads all KV entries into VFS before Python runs
- flushDataToKV: writes dirty /data files back to KV after Python exits
- Works across trampoline rounds (flushes on final exit only)

Python code can use standard file I/O:
  with open("/data/state.json", "w") as f: json.dump(state, f)

KV binding is optional — /data works as in-memory storage without it.
Configure via wrangler.toml kv_namespaces for persistence.

files.patch:
@@ -8,3 +8,10 @@ cpu_ms = 30000
 [[rules]]
 type = "CompiledWasm"
 globs = ["**/*.wasm"]
+
+# Persistent /data directory backed by KV
+# Create with: wrangler kv namespace create PYMODE_DATA
+# Then update the id below with the actual namespace ID
+# [[kv_namespaces]]
+# binding = "PYMODE_DATA"
+# id = "YOUR_KV_NAMESPACE_ID"
